bull.b: Analyst highlights UL EE and UL 1973 listings across material handling and ground support equipment portfolios, opening access to a meaningful market and enabling new orders and cross-selling to a sizable installed battery base.
Analyst sees revenue upside from next-generation telematics hardware and the SkyEMS 2.0 software platform converting beta users to paying customers, which could broaden recurring revenue streams.
Analyst notes return to profitability driven by product mix improvements, targeted cost reductions, and lower warranty expenses, supporting margin expansion potential.

bear.b: Analyst highlights revenue reduction caused by a purchase freeze at a major customer, exposing the company to order volatility tied to customer concentration.
Analyst warns that ongoing tariffs and an uncertain tariff macroenvironment have prevented some customers from placing orders, posing downside risk to revenue visibility.
